name: cip309-examples
description: Self-contained TypeScript reference implementations of the CIP-309 wire primitives, built only from public cryptographic libraries (no SDK dependency).

scripts.smoke: node src/end-to-end.ts && node src/smoke-parity.ts && node src/smoke-validator.ts && node src/smoke-tx-extract.ts && node src/standalone-verify-example.ts && node src/merkle-sha2-256.ts && node src/cid-validator.ts
